title: Royal Kashmir Valley Luxury Escape
highlights: Traditional Luxury Houseboat Stay on Dal Lake with Private Butler
Private Sunset Shikara Cruise with Kashmiri Kahwa service
VIP Gulmarg Gondola Ride (Phase 1 & Phase 2 tickets pre-booked)
Chauffeur-driven private luxury sedan escort throughout
Charming Riverside Picnic in Pahalgam on the banks of Lidder River

itinerary.title: Arrival in Srinagar & Dal Lake Houseboat Experience
itinerary.details: Welcome to Srinagar, the summer capital! Meet our airport representative and transfer to your luxury carved cedar wood Houseboat. Enjoy an authentic 1-hour sunset Shikara ride across the tranquil floating gardens.

itinerary.title: Srinagar Mughal Gardens Heritage Tour
itinerary.details: Explore famous historical Mughal Gardens: Shalimar Bagh, Nishat Bagh, and Chashme Shahi. Take in the grand heritage fountains and centuries-old Chinar trees with background mountains.

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg (Meadow of Flowers)
itinerary.details: Drive to Gulmarg, spectacular alpine pasture. Ride the highest cable car in Asia, the Gulmarg Gondola, up to Apharwat peak (Phase 2, 13,780 ft) for breathtaking views of Nanga Parbat.

itinerary.title: Gulmarg Leisure Exploration & Snow Sports
itinerary.details: Spend time at leisure in Gulmarg. Opt for skiing, snowboarding, or an escorted horseback ride through lush pine trails. Overnight stay in a heated alpine resort.

itinerary.title: Gulmarg to Pahalgam via Saffron Fields
itinerary.details: Journey to Pahalgam (Valley of Shepherds). En route, stop at the historical Saffron cultivation fields of Pampore and historic Awantipora ruins. Relax by the roaring Lidder River.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam Valley Tours (Aru, Betaab, & Chandanwari)
itinerary.details: Excursion to pristine Aru Valley, Betaab Valley (named after the Bollywood classic), and Chandanwari, the starting trail of the annual Amarnath pilgrimage.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam to Srinagar Airport Departure
itinerary.details: Transfer back to Srinagar Airport with beautiful memories and authentic Kashmiri walnut wood souvenirs provided by Sheenora Journeys.

inclusions: 1 Night Luxury Houseboat Stay with breakfast & dinner included
5 Nights Premium heated 4-star hotel stays (Gulmarg & Pahalgam)
Daily gourmet breakfast and local Wazwan-infused dinner
All airport transfers and local sightseeing in a private Luxury SUV
Pre-booked Phase 1 & 2 Gulmarg Gondola Entry passes
exclusions: Domestic Flights / Train ticket entry fares
Personal expenses such as tips, heater charges, additional meals
Premium adventure guides, optional hot-air balloon flights
Any costs due to unexpected weather landslides
seoDescription: Experience J&K in ultra-luxury. Private Houseboat stays, pre-booked Gulmarg Gondola rides, and majestic Pahalgam excursions with Sheenora Journeys.

title: Kashmiri Heritage & Honeymoon Haven
highlights: Complementary Suite decor, Saffron Almond milk & Honeyed Cake on arrival
Private candlelit dinner overlooking the floating lotus meadows of Nigeen Lake
Special couples Kashmiri Wazwan heritage tasting experience
Charming forest pony ride in Betaab Valley wood trails

itinerary.title: Welcome to Srinagar Houseboat Bliss
itinerary.details: Welcome with custom flower garlands. Transfer to a selected premium honeymoon houseboat. Enjoy decorated suites and a special sunset Shikara ride of Nigeen Lake.

itinerary.title: Romantic Tour of Old City & Heritage Shrine Walk
itinerary.details: Stroll down historic wood-carved lanes of Old Srinagar, visit Jamia Masjid, and the Shah-e-Hamdan wooden shrine. Savor Local bakery breads (Girda) with pink salted tea.

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Pahalgam Forest Escape
itinerary.details: Drive to Pahalgam. Check in to a premium riverview suite. Stroll through the romantic pine forest trails hand-in-hand.

itinerary.title: Baisaran 'Mini-Switzerland' Meadows Horseback Ride
itinerary.details: Ride horses through dense cedar woods to Baisaran meadow, an expansive hilltop glade with views of the snow-clad Pir Panjal range.

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Sonamarg - The Meadow of Gold
itinerary.details: Excursion to Sonamarg. Enjoy a spectacular trek or horse ride to Thajiwas Glacier, featuring permanent ice-sheets and gushing streams.

itinerary.title: Departure back to Srinagar Airport
itinerary.details: Savor your final breakfast together and take our driver's drop off to Srinagar Airport.

inclusions: Luxury Houseboat and premium riverfront resort stays
Special floral bedroom decor and honeymoon wazwan dinner
All transfers in private sedan with experienced English/Hindi speaking driver
Local horse riding tickets & guide fees included
seoDescription: The ultimate romantic escape to Jammu & Kashmir. Premium Nigeen lake houseboats, candlelit Wazwan dinners, and beautiful alpine meadows.

title: Offbeat Gurez & Lolab Valley Adventure
highlights: Explore J&K's least footprint frontier - Gurez Valley along the Kishenganga River
Marvel at Habba Khatoon Peak - the legendary pyramid mountain of Kashmir
Stay in authentic wooden homestays in Dawar with Dardic Tribe interactions
Enjoy untouched cedar forests and crystal caves of Lolab Valley

itinerary.title: Srinagar Arrival & Bandipora Sunset
itinerary.details: Arrive in Srinagar, drive past the majestic vast Wular Lake to the foothills of Bandipora. Overnight local rest.

itinerary.title: Bandipora to Gurez Valley via Razdan Pass
itinerary.details: Ascend through pine forests to Razdan Pass (11,672 ft), offering panoramic Himalayan views. Descend into Gurez, checking into our partner Dawar rustic riverside wooden lodge.

itinerary.title: Habba Khatoon Mountain & Local Dard Tribe Walk
itinerary.details: Visit the majestic Habba Khatoon peak, name-inspired by the ancient poetess. Explore the wooden hamlets of Dawar and taste pure mountain potato cuisines.

itinerary.title: Prisital Border Village Exploration
itinerary.details: Excursion further deep towards the Last Border Outposts of Tulail. Hike down to pristine water brooks.

itinerary.title: Gurez Valley to Lolab Valley Forest Lodge
itinerary.details: Drive to Lolab Valley, often called the 'Land of Love'. Check in to a premium cedar cottage surrounded by lush paddy and apple orchards.

itinerary.title: Kalaroos Caves & Heritage Springs Hike
itinerary.details: Hike to Kalaroos Caves, featuring centuries-old archaeological stone structures once believed to lead to Russia.

itinerary.title: Lolab Valley back to Srinagar Dal Lake
itinerary.details: Return to Srinagar. Check-in to a luxury lake lodge. Enjoy a local shopping run for Pashminas.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.details: Bid farewell to Srinagar. Fly home with stories of unexplored frontiers.

inclusions: All inner line permits for restricted border zones pre-arranged
7 Nights cozy wooden homestays & standard mountain lodges
Breakfast & dinner featuring raw local mountain organics
Professional off-road 4x4 vehicle with expert local mountain pilot
exclusions: Anything not mentioned in inclusions, winter gear rentals
seoDescription: Ditch the crowds. Travel to Dawar, Tulail, and Lolab. Explore Habba Khatoon peak with custom border permits arranged by Sheenora Journeys.

title: Sacred J&K Pilgrimage & Amarnath Yatra
highlights: Smooth Amarnath Yatra helicopter services (Paltal/Baltal routes pre-assisted)
VIP darshan guidance at the sacred ice Shiva Lingam cave
Sacred temple tours including Shankracharya Hill & Khir Bhawani temple
Dedicated Satvik vegetarian diet meals prepared daily

itinerary.title: Srinagar Arrival & Shankaracharya Hill Worship
itinerary.details: Arrive in Srinagar and visit the historic ancient grey stone Shankaracharya temple built high on a mountaintop, overlooking Dal Lake.

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Baltal Basecamp via Kangan
itinerary.details: Journey alongside the roaring Sindh river to Baltal base camp. Acclimatize in modern secured, clean tent accommodations.

itinerary.title: Baltal to Amarnath Cave - Holy Darshan & Return
itinerary.details: Pre-booked early morning Helicopter ride (or trek) to Panchtarni, followed by a light trek to the holy Amarnath cave. Darshan of the sacred natural ice Shiva Lingam. Return to base.

itinerary.title: Baltal to Srinagar - Khir Bhawani Heritage
itinerary.details: Drive back to Srinagar. En route, visit the Holy Tullamulla temple of Mata Khir Bhawani. Rest in tourist resort.

itinerary.title: Hazratbal Mosque & Local Heritage Craft Walk
itinerary.details: Visit Hazratbal shrine housing the holy relic of Prophet Muhammad. Explore papier-mâché craft workshops in Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.details: Drop-off to Srinagar Airport for terminal fly-outs.

inclusions: Standard helicopter token reservation backup
Standard heated spiritual guest houses and tent sites
Strictly Satvik vegetarian meals (no onion, no garlic options available)
Dedicated group guide for hassle-free holy queue entry
exclusions: Any individual donations, horse/palki charges, personal porter fees
seoDescription: Secure your holy darshan. Specialized Baltic and Pahalgam route guides, Amarnath helicopter slot booking on Sheenora Journeys.

title: Pir Panjal Heights & Alpine Trekking Quest
highlights: Trek to the turquoise Great Alpine Lakes of Kashmir (Vishansar & Kishansar)
High altitude pine-glade camping under dense stargazing arrays
River trout fishing permits and equipment included
Trek fully assisted by certified local mountaineers and pack horses

itinerary.title: Departure Sonamarg Basecamp Setup
itinerary.details: Assemble in Sonamarg meadow. Set camp beside the scenic glacial waters of Thajiwas, meet mountain guides and run load-weight checks.

itinerary.title: Ascent to Nichnai Meadow Pass
itinerary.details: Ascend steep dirt trails passing dense birch forests, reaching High Altitude Nichnai Meadow (11,400 ft) for campfire night setups.

itinerary.title: Cross Nichnai Pass to Vishansar Turquoise Lake
itinerary.details: Trek crossing Nichnai Pass (13,400 ft), marveling at glaciated peaks. Descend into the spectacular vast valley of alpine lake Vishansar.

itinerary.title: Vishansar to Kishansar Alpine twin lakes
itinerary.details: Short steep climb to Kishansar lake. Enjoy high altitude angling, alpine trout cookouts, and cloud reflection captures.

itinerary.title: Descend back towards Sonamarg Woods
itinerary.details: Trek back safely via the meadows of Nichnai, enjoying standard scenic ridge downhill slides.

itinerary.title: Sonamarg back to Srinagar Cedar Retreat
itinerary.details: Dry up and wash in a heated traditional Srinagar guest lodge. Rejoice with traditional Lamb Rogan Josh / Kashmiri Dum Aloo dishes.

itinerary.title: Airport Transfers
itinerary.details: Farewells and drop-off utility transfers.

inclusions: Premium quality weather-resistant alpine tents and sleeping pads
Qualified Wilderness First-Aid certified mountain instructors
Mules / horses to load collective kitchen and camping utensils
Local angling permits & fish gear setups
exclusions: Personal backpack carrying, personal trek gear/clothing rentals
seoDescription: Trek J&K's legendary alpine lakes with Sheenora Journeys. Expert mountaineers, safe premium camping, and custom angling permits.
